positionList.title: Senior Product Manager
positionList.description: Owned customer support tooling and workflows for Alexa's enterprise services, supported customers in planning large-scale deployments and piloted a service to speed device implementations

positionList.title: Senior Program Manager, Amazon Fresh Launch Operations
positionList.description:
- Led scaling and innovation initiatives for the end to end store bringup process, with focus on online and operations, technical and transactional testing, training, and labor utilization. Reduced outbound training/testing timelines by 50% and costs by 80% in 2021
- Developed, tested, and gained alignment on an online services rollout strategy that balanced customer demand and experience with over 15 internal KPIs and teams; developed tracking, communication, and Andon mechanisms for program changes in response to weekly site performance

positionList.title: Senior Program Manager, Global Specialty Fulfillment - Delivery
positionList.description:
- Developed the strategy, standard operating procedures, and training program for outbound sortation, dispatch, and delivery workflows for a new hybrid grocery business
- Scaled grocery delivery operations by 4x initially planned volumes within 2 weeks as COVID-19 pandemic was emerging, and developed equipment and workflow model to support social distancing during operations
- Defined and validated metrics and year 1 and 2 operating goals for AFS outbound operations. Exceeded all quality and rate of work goals by 30%+ in year 1, setting a new bar across Amazon’s grocery businesses

positionList.title: Curriculum Consultant, Instuctor
positionList.description: In partnership with CNY's Center for Regional Economic Development and Cornell's e-learning division, created and launched a new online certificate program for investors and entrepreneurs called Getting to Investment.

positionList.title: MBA Graduate
positionList.description:
Academic Honors
- Forté Fellow 
- Dean’s List – Fall 2018, Spring 2019
- TA: Entrepreneurship & Business Ownership, Ethical Decision-Making
- Degree Marshal for SC Johnson Graduate School of Management

Projects and Activities
- Co-founder of Ethichain, a startup focused on improving the transparency of global apparel supply chains through RFID and Blockchain. 
- Won Best Data Product in Designing Data Products class for a model that predicted the likelihood of cannabis legalization by state and assessed the economic impact of recreational and medical marijuana.

Selected Leadership Roles
- Class Agent and Alumni Council Representative: selected for a 5-year team, responsible for Annual Fund solicitation and leading philanthropic efforts and events for the one-year class of 2019.
- Chair, Johnson Women in Business (JWiB) Symposium: student leader for Johnson’s premier, 2-day fall women’s recruiting event and speaker series. Responsibilities included visioning, planning, day-of execution, and speeches.
- Operations and Logistics Chair, Johnson Women in Technology (JWiT) Conference: handled all logistics, budget negotiations, and day-of coordination for multi-disciplinary NYC-based event.
- Communications Ambassador, Johnson Admissions Group: One of less than 10 accelerated MBA students selected to interface with prospective candidates and maintain a curated social media presence to support the program’s online outreach.
- Make It Count Committee: One of 5 students selected annually to plan and execute 20+ events for over 270 classmates in the final 100 days leading up to Commencement.

Selected Coursework: 
Strategic Management of Technology & Innovation; The Business Idea Factory; Venture Capital Industry & Private Equity Markets; Design Thinking; Retail Operations

positionList.title: Adjunct Professor
positionList.location: New York, New York, United States
positionList.description: Instructor for graduate-level course MAN 5580 - Project Management. Overhauled materials to convert the class to a rigorous, 15-week project cycle that serves as a qualifying class for CAPM or PMP certification.

positionList.title: Adjunct Professor
positionList.location: New York, New York, United States
positionList.description: Instructor for CIS 9490 and CIS 4800 - the graduate and undergraduate sections of Systems Analysis and Design. Overhauled class materials to incorporate up-to-the-minute content around AI and cloud-based systems development processes and tools, and analysis frameworks used at top global tech companies. Adapted custom course materials for in-person, online, hybrid, and asynchronous learning environments.

positionList.title: Independent Consultant
positionList.description: SimpliFed is an innovative infant nutrition solution grounded in a first-of-its-kind longitudinal study on newborn microbiomes.  My work was focused on sourcing and conducting customer interviews to guide product/market fit, researching market and consumer trends to support FDA and NIH SBIR grants, and procuring and testing cold chain containers and workflows for shipping fecal samples cross-country.

- Supervised tactical analysis and designed media mix/profit optimization scenarios for new business opportunities across categories
